zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford於1276年出生在英國艾可普萊時，他的父親Humphrey VI de Bohun28歲，母親Mathilde de Fiennes26歲。他於1302年11月14日與Elizabeth of Rhuddlan在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1298年被列為lord high constable of england。他去世於1322年3月16日在英國越可爾波洛賀布利其享年46歲，埋葬在英國越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford于1276年出生在英国艾可普萊时，他的父亲Humphrey VI de Bohun28岁，母亲Mathilde de Fiennes26岁。他于1302年11月14日与Elizabeth of Rhuddlan在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1298年被列为lord high constable of england。他去世于1322年3月16日在英国越可爾波洛賀布利其享年46岁，埋葬在英国越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

variants.name: Humphry

The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. variants.name: Victor
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name meaning ‘conqueror’. This was popular among early Christians as a reference to Christ's victory over death and sin, and was borne by several saints. An influence on the choice of the name in more recent times was the American actor  Victor Mature  (  1915–99 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford was born in 1276, in Pleshy, Essex, England, his father, Humphrey VI de Bohun, was 28 and his mother, Mathilde de Fiennes, was 26. He married Elizabeth of Rhuddlan on 14 November 1302, in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. In 1298, his occupation is listed as lord high constable of england. He died on 16 March 1322, in Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.Westminster Abbey, London, England: Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford est né en 1276, à Pleshy, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey VI de Bohun, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Fiennes, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth of Rhuddlan le 14 novembre 1302, à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. En 1298, sa profession de son indiquée est lord high constable of england. Il est décédé le 16 mars 1322, à Boroughbridge, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford 1276 in Pleshy, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humphrey VI de Bohun 28 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Fiennes 26. Er hat am 14. November 1302 in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth of Rhuddlan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1298 ist sein Beruf als lord high constable of england aufgeführt. Er starb am 16. März 1322 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, England und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford è nato il nel 1276 nel Pleshy, Essex, England, il suo padre, Humphrey VI de Bohun, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Fiennes, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth of Rhuddlan il 14 novembre 1302, nel Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1298, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord high constable of england. Morì il 16 marzo 1322, nel Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Herefordが1276年にイギリスエセックスプレシュイで生まれた時，父Humphrey VI de Bohunは28歳，母Mathilde de Fiennesは26歳であった。1302年11月14日にイギリスイギリスロンドンウエストミンスターウエストミンスター アビーでElizabeth of Rhuddlanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1298年，職業はlord high constable of englandと記録されている。彼は1322年3月16日にイギリスヨークシュアイアボロウブリッジで46歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.Westminster Abbey, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford(이)가 1276년 영국 에세스 플레스히에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey VI de Bohun(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Fiennes(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1302년 11월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에서 Elizabeth of Rhuddlan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1298년, 그의 직업은 lord high constable of england이었다. 그는 1322년 3월 16일 영국 요르크실르 버루브리지에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.Knaresborough, North Yorkshire, England,: Knaresborough, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Westminster Abbey, London, England: Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford nasceu em 1276, em Pleshy, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey VI de Bohun, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Fiennes, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth of Rhuddlan em 14 de novembro de 1302, em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1298, sua profissão aparece como lord high constable of england. Ele faleceu em 16 de março de 1322, em Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Westminster Abbey, London, England: вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford родился в 1276 г. в местности плеши, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Humphrey VI de Bohun было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Fiennes, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth of Rhuddlan 14 ноября 1302 г. в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1298 году он работал по профессии lord high constable of england. Он умер 16 марта 1322 г. в местности бороугбридж, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey VII de Bohun 4th Earl of Hereford nació en 1276, en Pleshy, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey VI de Bohun, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Fiennes, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth of Rhuddlan el 14 de noviembre de 1302, en Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1298, su ocupación registrada era lord high constable of england. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1322, en Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
